interpretation: Popmax/global AF >1e-5 tension is common among AF-observed ClinVar P/LP variants; global-only workflows hide much of this signal.
VITAL >=60 compresses the broad frequency-tension space into a small set of variants where frequency must be interpreted against mechanism, LOEUF, expression, and domain context.
VITAL red is a case-study queue, not an appendix: each red variant has a distinct biological explanation for why AF tension does or does not undermine a P/LP assertion.
All red cases are shown with real gnomAD LOEUF and HPA heart-expression context, turning metadata flags into biological contrast statements.
